channel.title: Networking on xyanrch's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Networking on xyanrch's Blog

item.title: Overplus Getting Started: Set Up Your Own Proxy in 5 Minutes
item.description: Step-by-step guide to set up your own proxy server with Overplus. One-click install script + Windows GUI client, up and running in 5 minutes.

item.title: C++ Proxy Server Performance Optimization: From DNS Caching to TLS Session Reuse
item.description: Full-stack performance optimization for Overplus (a C++17 proxy server): global TCP DNS cache, SSL session reuse, buffer tuning, and log level demotion — 146 concurrent connections at just 25MB memory.
